caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-the-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. In the background, a white wall features repeating logos that say "HUSTLE" beneath five gold stars, and a large red and blue sign reads "BOSS Where BOSSES Talk! TALK 101." A black mug with red and white text that says "BOSS TALK 101" sits on the desk. Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a similar position, though his facial expression shifts slightly from a neutral, contemplative look to a subtle smile and then back to a neutral gaze. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man's head and torso as he looks slightly off-camera to his left.
